title: Washing Up Brushes Pack Of 3 | Removes Burnt Food & Grease Easily | Non Slip Grip, Built In Scraper & Hanging Hole | Ideal For Cleaning Dishes, Pans, Roasting Trays & Kitchen Use

features: Removes Burnt Food & Grease Easily: Designed with strong bristles that cut through stubborn grease and grime. Perfect for scrubbing roasting dishes, pans, and kitchenware clean without scratching surfaces.
Comfortable Non Slip Grip: Features an ergonomic curved handle that fits naturally in your hand, even when wet. Provides a secure, comfortable grip for effortless cleaning every time.
Built In Scraper For Stubborn Dirt: Integrated scraper at the top removes burnt-on food and tough residue quickly. Makes cleaning easier and more effective, saving time and effort in your kitchen.
Hangs To Dry & Stay Organised: Includes a built in hanging hole for easy storage. Keeps your sink area neat, clean, and hygienic while allowing brushes to dry faster between uses.
Pack Of 3 Great Value: Comes in a set of three bright colours — yellow, purple, and blue. Ideal for separating cleaning tasks or keeping one in each area of your home for convenience.
description: This pack of 3 washing up brushes makes cleaning fast and effortless. Strong bristles remove burnt food and grease easily, while the built in scraper tackles tough dirt. The curved non slip handle offers comfort and control, and the hanging hole keeps your sink organised. Ideal for dishes, pans, and kitchen cleaning.

specifications_table.Specific Uses For Product: Kitchen surfaces, dishes, pans, roasting trays, kitchenware
